mapper.sql: id, option_family_code, code, name, name_local, source, external_ref_id, external_version, last_sync_time, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_mdm_option_code ( id, option_family_code, code, name, name_local, source, external_ref_id, external_version, last_sync_time, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{optionFamilyCode}, #{code}, #{name}, #{nameLocal}, #{source}, #{externalRefId}, #{externalVersion}, #{lastSyncTime}, #{description}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO tb_mdm_option_code ( id, option_family_code, code, name, name_local, source, external_ref_id, external_version, last_sync_time, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.optionFamilyCode}, #{item.code}, #{item.name}, #{item.nameLocal}, #{item.source}, #{item.externalRefId}, #{item.externalVersion}, #{item.lastSyncTime}, #{item.description}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_mdm_option_code t SET
t.option_family_code = #{optionFamilyCode},
t.code = #{code},
t.name = #{name},
t.name_local = #{nameLocal},
t.source = #{source},
t.external_ref_id = #{externalRefId},
t.external_version = #{externalVersion},
t.last_sync_time = #{lastSyncTime},
t.description = #{description},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_mdm_option_code t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_mdm_option_code t WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_mdm_option_code t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM tb_mdm_option_code t WHERE t.row_valid = 1 AND t.code = #{code} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM tb_mdm_option_code t WHERE t.row_valid = 1 AND t.external_ref_id = #{externalRefId} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_mdm_option_code t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
